top_signals.title: Robinhood Chain tops $430 million in TVL, FalconX sees RWAs as the key differentiator
top_signals.summary: Robinhood Chain hit $431M TVL and 250K+ daily users in under three weeks, but memecoins account for 80% of its $9B DEX volume, FalconX says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
